name: White Christmas Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. In a saucepan, bring the water to a boil. Remove from heat; stir in confectionery coating until melted.
2. Cool for 20 minutes. Meanwhile, in a mixing bowl, cream butter and sugar. Add egg yolks; mix well.
3. Beat in coating and vanilla. Combine flour and baking soda; add to creamed mixture alternately with buttermilk.
4. Mix well. Stir in the coconut and pecans.
5. Beat egg whites until stiff peaks form; fold into the batter. Pour into three greased and floured 8-inch square baking pans.
6. Bake at 350°F for 25-30 minutes or until cake tests done. Cool in pans for 10 minutes; remove to wire rack to cool completely.
7. Combine frosting ingredients in a mixing bowl; beat well. Frost tops of two layers; stack on serving plate with plain layer on top.
8. Frost top and sides of cake. Yield: 10-12 servings.
